/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libstator_c_core.so -o libstator_c_core.so CMakeFiles/stator_c_core.dir/csrc/params.c.o CMakeFiles/stator_c_core.dir/csrc/gmsh_backend.c.o CMakeFiles/stator_c_core.dir/csrc/geometry_builder.c.o CMakeFiles/stator_c_core.dir/csrc/topology_registry.c.o CMakeFiles/stator_c_core.dir/csrc/mesh_generator.c.o CMakeFiles/stator_c_core.dir/csrc/export_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/stator_c_core.dir/csrc/batch_scheduler.c.o  -lm -lpthread
